languages.text: {n}Бросив взгляд на Эоганна, женщина мрачно добавляет:{/n} "И труд наш вполне законен, хоть мы и не пользуемся любовью вашей братии".
{n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."
languages.original_text: {n}Бросив взгляд на Эоганна, женщина мрачно добавляет:{/n} "И труд наш вполне законен, хоть мы и не пользуемся любовью вашей братии".

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn:{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we hold no love from your kind."
{n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn:{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we hold no love from your kind."
{n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."
{n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

languages.text: {n}Con tono sombrío y sin apartar la mirada de Eogunn, la mujer añade:{/n} «Nuestro trabajo es perfectamente legal, por impopular que sea entre sus camaradas».
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con tono sombrío y sin apartar la mirada de Eogunn, la mujer añade:{/n} «Nuestro trabajo es perfectamente legal, por impopular que sea entre sus camaradas».

languages.text: {n}那女人瞥了伊奥贡一眼，冷冷补充道：{/n}“我们的工作完全合法，只不过在你那些同僚当中不太受欢迎。”
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text: {n}那女人瞥了伊奥贡一眼，冷冷补充道：{/n}“我们的工作完全合法，只不过在你那些同僚当中不太受欢迎。”

languages.text: {n}Mit einem Blick auf Eogunn fügt die Frau grimmig hinzu:{/n} "Und unsere Arbeit ist absolut rechtmäßig, wir sind bei Euren Leuten nur nicht beliebt."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem Blick auf Eogunn fügt die Frau grimmig hinzu:{/n} "Und unsere Arbeit ist absolut rechtmäßig, wir sind bei Euren Leuten nur nicht beliebt."

languages.text: {n}Avec un bref regard en direction d'Eogunn, la femme poursuit d'un air grave :{/n} « Et notre travail est parfaitement légal, même si vos petits copains ne nous portent pas dans leur cœur. »
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un bref regard en direction d'Eogunn, la femme poursuit d'un air grave :{/n} « Et notre travail est parfaitement légal, même si vos petits copains ne nous portent pas dans leur cœur. »

languages.text: {n}Kadın, Eogunn'a bakış atarken asık bir suratla ekliyor.{/n} "Bizim işimiz tamamen yasaldır, her ne kadar sizin yoldaşlarınız arasında pek popüler olmasak da."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadın, Eogunn'a bakış atarken asık bir suratla ekliyor.{/n} "Bizim işimiz tamamen yasaldır, her ne kadar sizin yoldaşlarınız arasında pek popüler olmasak da."

languages.text:
女は、エオグンにちらりと目を向ける。
「我々の仕事は、法律に則って行っている。だが、我々は貴方の仲間たちには好まれない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."

traits.locale_text:
女は、エオグンにちらりと目を向ける。
「我々の仕事は、法律に則って行っている。だが、我々は貴方の仲間たちには好まれない。」
